queued.title: [P4.4] Backend: GET /api/agents — list agent definitions
queued.body: Tạo src/openharness/webui/server/routes/agents.py. GET /api/agents gọi coordinator/agent_definitions.py load functions. Trả về list {name, description, model, effort, permission_mode, tools_count, has_system_prompt, source_file}.

queued.title: [WebUI] Fix websocket 1006 connection closed banner and reconnect lifecycle
queued.body: Problem: WebUI shows 'Connection closed (code=1006)' in Header after launching/opening the app. Review frontend/webui/src/api/client.ts openWebSocket() and frontend/webui/src/store/session.ts setStatus(), plus backend src/openharness/webui/server/routes/sessions.py and websocket route handling. Current client marks any onclose as errorBanner immediately, retries only once, and can show stale 1006 during normal session replacement/unmount. Acceptance: distinguish expected/manual close from abnormal close, clear stale banner after successful reconnect, provide useful message for auth/backend failures, and add tests for close/reconnect behavior. Repro: run oh webui, open /chat, observe header banner 'Connection closed (code=1006)' as in screenshot.

queued.title: [WebUI] Make OpenHarness left menu button work on desktop
queued.body: Problem: The hamburger button next to OpenHarness appears clickable but does not visibly affect the UI on desktop. AppLayout toggles sidebarOpen, but Sidebar renders desktop sidebar as always visible with class hidden h-full sm:block and only uses open for the mobile drawer. Acceptance: define desktop behavior for the button (collapse/expand sidebar or hide button on desktop), implement it consistently, preserve mobile drawer behavior, add component tests for desktop and mobile menu interactions. Relevant files: frontend/webui/src/App.tsx, frontend/webui/src/components/Header.tsx, frontend/webui/src/components/Sidebar.tsx, Header.test.tsx or new Sidebar/App layout tests.

queued.title: [WebUI] Add browser smoke test for oh webui startup and primary shell interactions
queued.body: Problem: Recent WebUI startup regressions included missing exports, create_app signature mismatch, websocket connection banner, and non-working shell menu button. Add an automated browser smoke test or integration test that starts the WebUI app/server, loads /chat, asserts no initial connection error banner after websocket opens, verifies Sessions and permission dropdowns open, and verifies the OpenHarness menu/sidebar interaction behaves as specified. Acceptance: test fails on the current menu/noisy-connection regressions and passes after fixes; include guidance for running it locally in docs or test output.
